# Isopach Mapping

**Summary**: Mapping of equal thicknesses to identify the geometry and thickness of a geological unit.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1996-jarad|Jarad, 1996]] used isopach maps to determine the relationship between thickness and grade.

## Key Results and Findings

- Isopach maps confirmed the lenticular nature of the deposit in all three horizons. ([[1996-jarad|Jarad, 1996, p. 70]])
